classifications.phrase: economic recovery is well under way and has been stronger than was earlier expected
strong growth in employment and a welcome decline in the unemployment rate
Wage and price pressures are subdued and are expected to remain so for some years
it will be some time before the labour market is tight enough to generate wage…
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
The Board does not expect these conditions to be met until 2024 at the earliest

payload.rationale: The RBA maintains an accommodative stance, emphasizing subdued inflation pressures, spare capacity in the labour market, and commitment to keeping rates low until 2024 at the earliest, signaling a dovish bias across inflation, growth, and employment dimensions.
